sizing_rule.note: Optimal f=0.5 for 50/50 game with 2:1 win/loss ratio. Size 1 bet per $2 stake. Avoid aggressive sizing (1:$2.50 or 1:$10) which produces suboptimal long-term results despite feeling safer.

source_rule_text: Do not overbet; optimal position sizing in a 50/50 game with 2:1 win/loss ratio requires an f value of 0.5, meaning 1 bet for every $2 in stake to avoid breaking even or losses from overbetting.
